WELCOME_DESCRIPTION:
We're super excited to have you here! 🎉

Check out the channels, introduce yourself, and have fun!
WELCOME_GETTING_STARTED:
1️⃣ Read the rules in #rules
2️⃣ Say hi in #introductions
3️⃣ Enjoy your stay! 😎
WELCOME_TIPS:
React to the role messages to get your special roles!
Use /help to see all available commands.
TESTWELCOME_SENT: ✅ Test welcome message sent to your DMs for user: {member_mention}
TESTWELCOME_NO_DM: ❌ I couldn't send you a DM. Please check your privacy settings.
MISSING_PERMISSIONS: ❌ You need Administrator permissions to use this command.
BAD_ARGUMENT: ❌ Please mention a valid member or leave it blank to test with yourself.
LOG_MISSING_IMAGE: ❌ Missing image file for welcome message
LOG_WELCOME_FAILED: ❌ Failed to send welcome message to {member_name} ({member_id}): {error}
LOG_TEST_WELCOME: 🧪 Test welcome message executed by {admin_mention} for {member_mention}
